fields.name: make
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Manufacturer brand shown to users and used for identity matching.

fields.name: model
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Model family shown to users; protected families remain separate where applicable.

fields.name: variant
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Current-market variant or trim/powertrain identity.

fields.name: full_name
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Display identity composed from make, model and variant.

fields.name: body_type
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Primary body-style filter used by the recommendation app.

fields.name: price_ex_showroom
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Ex-showroom price in INR; required positive numeric filter and ranking input.

fields.name: fuel_type
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Canonical powertrain fuel category.

fields.name: transmission
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Canonical transmission label; generic Automatic is preserved where evidence is not specific.

fields.name: engine_cc
fields.applicability: Combustion vehicles; null is valid for Electric rows.
fields.description: Engine displacement; applicable to combustion vehicles and null for Electric rows.

fields.name: power_bhp
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Peak power; retained physically but conditional/excluded from first ML feature set until coverage improves.

fields.name: torque_nm
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Peak torque; retained physically but conditional/excluded from first ML feature set until coverage improves.

fields.name: drivetrain
fields.applicability: Nullable; do not infer missing drivetrain values.
fields.description: Canonical drivetrain; nullable and limited to FWD, RWD, AWD and 4WD.

fields.name: mileage_arai_kmpl
fields.applicability: Petrol, Diesel and compatible Hybrid rows where verified.
fields.description: ARAI mileage in kmpl, primarily for Petrol, Diesel and compatible Hybrid rows.

fields.name: mileage_arai_km_per_kg
fields.applicability: CNG rows where verified.
fields.description: ARAI mileage in km/kg, applicable to CNG rows.

fields.name: claimed_ev_range_km
fields.applicability: Electric rows only; non-Electric rows should be null.
fields.description: Claimed electric driving range, applicable to Electric rows only.

fields.name: seating_capacity
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Seat count used for filtering and family-size ranking.

fields.name: boot_space_litres
fields.applicability: Nullable; do not infer across fuel or seating layouts.
fields.description: Boot volume in litres; nullable and conditional for ML because coverage varies by body and fuel layout.

fields.name: ground_clearance_mm
fields.applicability: Nullable; use only current-generation verified values.
fields.description: Ground clearance in millimetres; nullable and conditional for ML because coverage is limited.

fields.name: airbags
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Numeric airbag count used as a safety ranking feature.

fields.name: abs
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Anti-lock braking system availability; retained as audit-only because currently constant.

fields.name: esc
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Electronic stability control availability.

fields.name: hill_assist
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Hill-assist availability.

fields.name: tyre_pressure_monitoring_system
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Tyre-pressure monitoring availability.

fields.name: rear_parking_sensors
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Rear parking sensor availability; retained as audit-only because currently constant.

fields.name: rear_camera
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Rear camera availability.

fields.name: camera_360
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: 360-degree camera availability.

fields.name: automatic_climate_control
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Automatic climate-control availability.

fields.name: rear_ac_vents
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Rear AC vent availability.

fields.name: android_auto
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Android Auto availability.

fields.name: apple_carplay
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Apple CarPlay availability.

fields.name: sunroof
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Sunroof availability.

fields.name: ventilated_front_seats
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Ventilated front seat availability.

fields.name: connected_car_features
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: Connected-car feature availability.

fields.name: adas_available
fields.applicability: Variant-level boolean; null means unknown or not sufficiently verified.
fields.description: ADAS availability.

fields.name: source
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Row-level source label for audit and refresh provenance.

fields.name: source_last_updated
fields.applicability: All rows
fields.description: Date or timestamp associated with the row source.
